"'''A Necessary Evil'''" is a short story written by [[Chuck Truett]] based on an illustration by [[Dan Schaefer]]. It was originally published in ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Skerrit]] discussed with [[Tosha]] about bringing the [[bandara]], a creature hated by the females of [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaron]], back to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
